description: Mid-difficulty: explicit bullish call on ANET with a concrete target but softer conviction language ('I think', 'should'). Timeframe is relative ('six months from now') and must be resolved against the publish_date anchor.

input.title: Arista Networks Earnings Preview
input.transcript: Let's talk about Arista Networks, ticker ANET. I think Arista is one of the more underrated names in the AI infrastructure build-out. They are the plumbing behind the hyperscalers and the cloud capex cycle is not slowing down. My view: ANET should reach one hundred and forty dollars in the next six months. It's a moderate conviction call for me. Not my biggest position but I am adding selectively. The risk is hyperscaler capex guidance coming in softer than expected, but I don't think that happens. Arista, ANET, one forty, six months from now.
